children.value: An XR system for wildfire resilience that uses AI to support situational awareness and community decision-making in high-risk environments. Built with multi-user spatial interfaces and real geospatial data, enabling first responders and researchers to collaboratively analyze fire behavior and evacuation planning. Presented at ACM MXR 2026 in Portland.

An XR system for wildfire resilience that uses AI to support situational awareness and community decision-making in high-risk environments. Built with multi-user spatial interfaces and real geospatial data, enabling first responders and researchers to collaboratively analyze fire behavior and evacuation planning. Presented at ACM MXR 2026 in Portland.
